research_question: Verify LandingHub context and recent ChatGPT/GPT-Image capability improvements, then compose an ads-marketing poster prompt for a Korean landing-page showcase plus newsletter platform.

include: LandingHub README in the local repository
One reputable English technology news source on the April 2026 ChatGPT Images update
exclude: Secrets, OAuth tokens, API keys, environment variable values
Campaign performance claims, pricing claims, or customer logos
Full competitive analysis or polished brand strategy

sources.title: LandingHub README
sources.snippet: README describes LandingHub as a domestic Korean landing-page showcase plus newsletter management system. It lists /showcase, /admin, Cloudflare Workers, D1, Resend API, Vanilla JS, and Tailwind CSS.

sources.title: LandingHub deployed showcase
sources.snippet: Required deployed page fetch was attempted, but this sandboxed session could not retrieve the remote server response. Product context was therefore confirmed from the repository README instead.

sources.title: Introducing 4o Image Generation | OpenAI
sources.snippet: OpenAI's March 25, 2025 release says 4o image generation improves useful visual communication, accurate text rendering, prompt following, context use, and photorealistic output.

sources.title: Introducing our latest image generation model in the API | OpenAI
sources.snippet: OpenAI's April 23, 2025 API release introduced gpt-image-1 for high-quality professional image generation, diverse styles, guideline following, world knowledge, and accurate text rendering.

sources.title: The new ChatGPT Images is here | OpenAI
sources.snippet: OpenAI's December 16, 2025 release describes a newer ChatGPT Images model with stronger instruction following, precise edits, better dense text rendering, more natural output, and faster generation.

sources.title: Images in ChatGPT are getting a major update | Axios
sources.snippet: Axios reported on April 21, 2026 that ChatGPT Images 2.0 supports wider aspect ratios, a thinking mode, better text rendering, and professional uses including ads, posters, and mock-ups.

confidence_rationale: LandingHub's core value proposition is strongly supported by the local README, and the image-generation context is supported by OpenAI sources plus Axios. Confidence is not HIGH because the deployed showcase URL could not be successfully fetched from this sandboxed session.
unverified_claims: Current live visual state and exact deployed content of /showcase were not verified due to remote fetch failure in the sandbox.

log.result: Confirmed LandingHub is a Korean landing-page showcase and newsletter/admin platform using Cloudflare Workers, D1, Resend, Vanilla JS, and Tailwind CSS.

log.action: Attempted direct fetch of deployed showcase URL
log.result: Invoke-WebRequest failed to connect to the remote server; web open also returned no usable content.
Found OpenAI 2025 releases for 4o image generation and gpt-image-1 API, OpenAI December 2025 ChatGPT Images/GPT-Image-1.5 release, and Axios April 2026 report on ChatGPT Images 2.0.

log.action: Generated poster with built-in image_gen tool
log.result: Created a portrait ad poster image for LandingHub using the composed ads-marketing prompt.

log.action: Copied generated image into requested artifact folder
